reproduction_contract.dataset_plan: MuJoCo (no download): Simulators provided by `gymnasium[mujoco]==0.29.1` + `mujoco==3.1.1`. Set `MUJOCO_GL=egl` for headless Docker. Use -v4 environments; -v1 removed in gymnasium>=0.26 (see ENV003, accepted ~5-15% reward deviation). Atari ROMs (pre-installed in Docker): Installed via `AutoROM[accept-rom-license]==0.6.1` with `AutoROM --accept-license` during build. Use NoFrameskip-v4 variants; CleanRL ppo_atari.py applies its own frame-skip and grayscale wrappers. Verify: `python -c "import ale_py, gymnasium; gymnasium.make('BreakoutNoFrameskip-v4').reset(); print('OK')"`. No external data files, checkpoints, or pre-collected trajectories required.
reproduction_contract.evaluation_plan: MUJOCO (Section 6.1 / Table 1): (1) Record all episodic returns per run. (2) Compute mean return over last 100 episodes per run. (3) Normalize per-env: (score − random_score) / (best_score − random_score) where random_score = published random-policy baselines and best_score = max mean-final-perf across 3 seeds for PPO Clip. (4) Average all 21 normalized scores → single scalar. Target: ≥0.70 (paper: 0.82; −0.12 tolerance for -v4 drift). ATARI (Section 6.4 / Table 2): (1) Record full episode-return history per run. (2) Metric A: mean over entire training. (3) Metric B: mean over last 100 episodes. (4) Average each metric across 3 seeds per game. (5) Compare PPO vs A2C (CleanRL/SB3 A2C benchmarks as reference; A2C not re-run). (6) Count games won per metric. Target: PPO wins ≥3/5 games on Metric A for the 5-game subset.
reproduction_contract.full_run_plan: PHASE 1 — MuJoCo Benchmark (FULL, 21 runs): Environments: [HalfCheetah-v4, Hopper-v4, InvertedDoublePendulum-v4, InvertedPendulum-v4, Reacher-v4, Swimmer-v4, Walker2d-v4] x Seeds [1, 2, 3]. Command: `python ppo_continuous_action.py --env-id {ENV} --total-timesteps 1000000 --learning-rate 3e-4 --num-envs 1 --num-steps 2048 --num-minibatches 32 --update-epochs 10 --clip-coef 0.2 --gamma 0.99 --gae-lambda 0.95 --ent-coef 0.0 --vf-coef 0.5 --max-grad-norm 0.5 --seed {SEED}`. Minibatch size = (1×2048)/32 = 64, matching Table 3. Est. ~5-7 hours for all 21 runs (parallelizable). PHASE 2 — Atari Benchmark (BUDGETED, 5-game subset, 15 runs): Games: [BreakoutNoFrameskip-v4, BeamRiderNoFrameskip-v4, PongNoFrameskip-v4, QbertNoFrameskip-v4, SpaceInvadersNoFrameskip-v4] x Seeds [1, 2, 3]. Command: `python ppo_atari.py --env-id {GAME} --total-timesteps 10000000 --learning-rate 2.5e-4 --num-envs 8 --num-steps 128 --num-minibatches 4 --update-epochs 3 --clip-coef 0.1 --anneal-lr True --clip-vloss True --ent-coef 0.01 --vf-coef 1.0 --max-grad-norm 0.5 --gamma 0.99 --gae-lambda 0.95 --seed {SEED}`. Minibatch = (8×128)/4 = 256, matching Table 5. STRETCH: Full 49-game Atari requires GPU (~145 GPU-hours).
reproduction_contract.reproduction_definition: Reproduce the two primary quantitative claims from Schulman et al. 2017 (PPO) using CleanRL v1.0.0 + PyTorch 2.1.0 + gymnasium 0.29.1 + MuJoCo 3.1.1 (DeepMind free release): (1) MuJoCo benchmark (Table 1, Section 6.1): PPO with clipped surrogate objective (epsilon=0.2) achieves an average normalized score >= 0.70 across 7 MuJoCo -v4 continuous control environments x 3 seeds (21 runs), with a target of 0.82 from the paper (tolerance of -0.12 granted for -v4 vs -v1 dynamics drift, ~5-15% expected deviation per ENV003). (2) Atari benchmark (Table 2, Section 6.4, BUDGETED): PPO wins a majority of head-to-head comparisons against A2C across a representative 5-game subset (BeamRider, Breakout, Pong, Qbert, SpaceInvaders) trained for 40M game frames (10M timesteps) and 3 seeds per game; full 49-game reproduction is tracked as a stretch goal requiring GPU. Roboschool (Section 6.3) is EXCLUDED per ENV008 (deprecated, qualitative-only). The reproduction is APPROXIMATE: uses -v4 MuJoCo envs instead of deprecated -v1, PyTorch instead of TF1, and incorporates undocumented but necessary implementation tricks (Adam eps=1e-5, max_grad_norm=0.5, orthogonal init, per-minibatch advantage normalization, value-function loss clipping) that are absent from the paper but present in all reference implementations.
reproduction_contract.smoke_test_plan: Goal: Validate the full pipeline in under 2 minutes. MuJoCo smoke test: `python /workspace/cleanrl/cleanrl/ppo_continuous_action.py --env-id HalfCheetah-v4 --total-timesteps 50000 --learning-rate 3e-4 --num-envs 1 --num-steps 2048 --num-minibatches 32 --update-epochs 10 --clip-coef 0.2 --gamma 0.99 --gae-lambda 0.95 --seed 1 --track False`. Pass criteria: (a) completes without error, (b) ≥1 policy update occurs, (c) episodic_return is finite, (d) no NaN in losses, (e) <120s on CPU. Atari smoke test: `python /workspace/cleanrl/cleanrl/ppo_atari.py --env-id BreakoutNoFrameskip-v4 --total-timesteps 50000 --num-envs 8 --num-steps 128 --num-minibatches 4 --update-epochs 3 --clip-coef 0.1 --anneal-lr True --seed 1 --track False`. Same pass criteria.
verification_checklist: MuJoCo: 2-layer MLP, 64 units, tanh, separate policy/value networks (no shared params), Gaussian head
MuJoCo hyperparameters: LR=3e-4, T=2048, minibatch=64, K=10, gamma=0.99, lambda=0.95, epsilon=0.2, ent-coef=0.0
Atari: A3C CNN (Conv32/8x8/s4 → Conv64/4x4/s2 → Conv64/3x3/s1 → FC512 → shared policy+value heads)
Atari hyperparameters: LR=2.5e-4 annealed, N=8, T=128, minibatch=256, K=3, epsilon=0.1 annealed, ent-coef=0.01, vf-coef=1.0
Adam epsilon=1e-5 confirmed (not PyTorch default 1e-8) — verify optimizer constructor in CleanRL source
max_grad_norm=0.5 gradient clipping applied before optimizer step
Orthogonal init: hidden scale=sqrt(2), policy head scale=0.01, value head scale=1.0
Per-minibatch advantage normalization (mean=0, std=1 within each minibatch, not globally)
Value-function loss clipping applied (clipped + unclipped in max() formulation)
GAE uses stopped gradient for V(s_T) bootstrap term
MuJoCo total timesteps = exactly 1,000,000 per run
Atari total timesteps = exactly 10,000,000 per run (= 40M frames / 4 frame-skip)
3 independent seeds per environment with torch.manual_seed and numpy seed set
MuJoCo normalization: (score − random) / (best − random), averaged over all 21 runs
Atari two metrics both reported: all-training avg and last-100-episodes avg
MuJoCo avg normalized score ≥ 0.70 (primary pass/fail, paper target 0.82)
Atari PPO wins majority of head-to-head game comparisons vs A2C on Metric A
No NaN or infinite values in metrics.json
Reward curves show improving trend for ≥4/7 MuJoCo environments
Roboschool confirmed EXCLUDED with rationale (ENV008: deprecated, qualitative-only, no quantitative baselines)
All 21 MuJoCo runs completed without crashes or timeouts
Docker container builds successfully from provided Dockerfile; `[OK] torch=... gymnasium=... mujoco=...` printed
MUJOCO_GL=egl confirmed set in environment before any MuJoCo run
Atari ROM install verified: `gymnasium.make('BreakoutNoFrameskip-v4')` succeeds without ImportError
